name: Peanut Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine egg yolks with cold water. Beat until thick and fluffy.
2. Add 1/2 cup sugar. Mix thoroughly.
3. Beat egg whites until stiff. Add remaining sugar. Beat thoroughly.
4. Fold the egg whites into the first mixture.
5. Sift flour, measure it, and sift baking powder and salt with it.
6. Fold the dry ingredients into the egg mixture.
7. Add vanilla flavoring.
8. Pour batter into a well-oiled cake pan.
9. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for about 20 minutes.
10. Cool completely.
11. Cut into squares.
12. Ice with desired icing and roll in ground peanuts.
